flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Augustana College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($46.2k → $51.6k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Augustana College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($46.2k → $51.6k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Augustana College fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (75.5% → 66.8%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Augustana College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.1% → 0.0%).
